focus: Validation — pattern discoverability, cross-skill reference, banned phrase verification

tasks.instruction: Draft an open-letter-style article for magnus919.com titled 'Dear Gravity, What The Fuck Was That?' about a gravitational wave discovery. The narrator is a transparent non-expert making sense of complex physics. Use the specialized article pattern from the skill's reference files.
tasks.input_data: Site: magnus919. Open letter to gravity about a binary black hole merger. Core frame: honest ignorance. Check the skill's article pattern selection table for the right structure.
tasks.expected_outcome: Agent discovers the epistolary pattern from the new table at Step 4. Combines with honest-ignorance voice rule. No emdashes. Contractions used.
tasks.success_criteria: Epistolary pattern discovered and used. Honest-ignorance frame. No emdashes. Contractions. Inline citations with descriptive anchors. No fabrication of data.

tasks.instruction: Draft an article for groktop.us titled 'The Build vs. Buy Decision in the AI Era' about enterprise AI procurement strategy. Read the site profile. Apply the cross-skill reference for cover pattern selection.
tasks.input_data: Site: groktop.us. Analytical article about enterprise AI build-vs-buy decisions. Must read site profile and check the groktopus-branding cross-reference at Step 1.
tasks.expected_outcome: Agent reads the site profile. Discovers the groktopus-branding cross-reference from Step 1. Selects the correct cover pattern. Article has analytical tone and inline citations.
tasks.success_criteria: Site profile read. Groktopus-branding skill cross-reference discovered. Pattern A (Strategy Session) selected for strategy article. No emdashes. Contractions. Inline citations.

tasks.instruction: Magnus says 'run an editorial pass' on the attached draft. The draft is at /tmp/draft-for-review.md. Apply the editorial pipeline from the skill's reference files.
tasks.input_data: A draft exists at /tmp/draft-for-review.md (a short note about AI memory systems). Magnus said 'editorial-pass'. Check the skill's Step 10 for the editorial pipeline reference.
tasks.expected_outcome: Agent discovers the editorial pipeline cross-reference at Step 10. Runs all five audits: fact-check → voice-check → humanize → engagement-review → copy-edit.
tasks.success_criteria: Editorial pipeline cross-reference discovered at Step 10. All five audits applied. At least emdash check and banned-phrase grep run.
